project.title: The Kudzu Place — Corinne Ashbury's Four Growing Seasons
project.description: Góa phụ 38 tuổi Corinne Ashbury mua 104 mẫu đất bị kudzu nuốt trọn 22 năm tại Gilmer County, Georgia bằng gần hết tiền bảo hiểm của chồng. Bằng 83 con dê, một cuốn sổ cái và 4 mùa sinh trưởng, cô dọn sạch dây leo, cứu 9 cây hồ đào cổ ẩn dưới tán, vượt kỳ thẩm định covenant của hạt — mảnh đất từng 3 lần đấu giá không ai trả giá được định giá lại 462.800 đô.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera, clean uncluttered frame

characters.name: Corinne Ashbury
characters.description: 38-year-old woman, quiet widowed claims adjuster turned goat farmer, shoulder-length ash-brown hair tied back, composed reserved face with steady gray-green eyes, olive-green canvas barn coat over a cream work shirt, faded blue jeans, small silver wedding band

characters.name: Otis Ashbury (8-10 tuổi, mùa 1-2)
characters.description: 8-year-old boy, small watchful frame, neatly cut short brown hair, curious counting gaze, red plaid flannel shirt under a navy blue zip jacket, scuffed brown school shoes

characters.name: Otis Ashbury (11-12 tuổi, mùa 3-4)
characters.description: 12-year-old boy, tall lanky preteen frame, short brown hair, thoughtful steady gaze, olive-drab field jacket over a gray t-shirt, blue jeans, worn leather work gloves

characters.name: Burl Tannehill
characters.description: 71-year-old man, weathered goat rancher, white close-cropped hair under a faded tan feed cap, deep-lined patient face, tan duck-canvas chore coat over a red and black plaid flannel shirt, worn brown leather boots

characters.name: Merle Yates
characters.description: 56-year-old man, broad heavyset row-crop farmer, ruddy open face, gray-streaked short hair under a green seed cap, dark brown canvas work jacket over a light blue chambray shirt

characters.name: Dr. Nadine Croft (county extension agent)
characters.description: 45-year-old woman, practical county extension agent, short dark brown hair, direct level gaze, khaki field shirt with sleeves rolled up, dark olive utility vest, denim jeans

characters.name: Dean Whitcomb (county appraiser)
characters.description: 44-year-old man, reserved county tax appraiser, neat side-parted light brown hair, mild official expression, light gray button-down shirt under a navy windbreaker, khaki trousers, metal clipboard in hand

characters.name: Pepper (dê cái đầu đàn)
characters.description: elderly female lead goat, gray muzzle on a brown-and-white short-haired doe, calm amber eyes, brass bell on a worn dark leather neck strap

settings.name: Bậc thềm tòa án hạt Gilmer
settings.keywords: gray stone county courthouse steps, tall columned entrance, small-town square, bare late-winter trees

settings.name: Đồi kudzu 104 mẫu
settings.keywords: hillside smothered in dense kudzu vines, one unbroken green wave over fence lines and barn shapes, gravel road below

settings.name: Dưới tán dây kudzu
settings.keywords: dim green cavern beneath kudzu canopy, hanging vine curtains, shafts of filtered light, leaf-littered ground

settings.name: Cụm 9 cây hồ đào cổ
settings.keywords: nine towering old pecan trees on an open slope, pale wide trunks in a forty-foot grid, chewed cleared ground

settings.name: Bếp nhà Corinne
settings.keywords: modest farmhouse kitchen, worn wooden table under a single warm light, open ledger and papers, plain curtained window

settings.name: Nhà kho / chuồng cỏ cũ
settings.keywords: weathered gray wooden hay barn, sagging roof line, dim cluttered interior with wooden shelves and tarps

settings.name: Sườn đồi đã dọn - paddock lưới điện
settings.keywords: cleared red-dirt slope with electric netting paddocks, browse-line stubble, dry gray vine ropes on fence wire

settings.name: Vườn hồ đào non trồng theo luống
settings.keywords: young pecan orchard in contour strips, slender staked saplings with flags, mowed grass lanes down an open hillside

mood_map.nostalgic: soft golden light, warm palette, slight gaussian blur, memory haze
mood_map.determined: strong directional light, firm posture, clear focus, measured deliberation
mood_map.hopeful: morning light, open composition, warm highlights, belief in posture
mood_map.sad: muted desaturated palette, overcast lighting, empty space, weight of waiting
mood_map.calm: even soft lighting, neutral tones, balanced composition, stillness
mood_map.vindication: bright clear light, expansive framing, tangible proof visible in numbers or soil or growth
mood_map.reflection: warm but muted interior light, meditative space, inward gaze, contemplation
mood_map.shock: dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, stark tonal contrast
mood_map.dismissive: flat overcast light, distant framing, cold detachment
mood_map.tense: cool blue-gray tones, hard shadows, tight framing
